description:
Modify a baseline flat-roof building to simulate a Phoenix data center, cover its roof with premium solar panels, and export an annual building energy analysis showing the combined electricity generation and reduced cooling load.

Instructions:
1. Locate the large, simple rectangular building with a completely flat roof (this represents your baseline data center).
2. Change the project location/city to Phoenix, AZ.
3. Install a dense solar panel array on the roof of this specific flat-roofed building (at least 50 panels).
4. Upgrade the solar panels to a premium model (e.g., cell efficiency > 20% or select a high-efficiency SunPower model).
5. Run the Annual Building Energy Analysis for this building.
6. Export the resulting data to a CSV file named exactly `~/Documents/Energy3D/thermal_offset_results.csv`.
7. Save your modified 3D scene as a new file at `~/Documents/Energy3D/datacenter_shaded.ng3`.
